overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city street dominated by large spherical industrial tanks. The scene features modern commercial buildings, scattered pedestrians, light vehicle traffic, and concrete barriers with graffiti under a partly cloudy midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with industrial complex on right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching distant pedestrians

entered.detail: large metallic spherical storage tanks behind a concrete wall
multi-story commercial building with glass facade and billboards
network of electrical cables suspended above the street
tall pole with distinctive horizontal orange light bar
concrete dividers with orange and white stripes separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city. To the right, large spherical industrial tanks dominate the skyline behind a concrete wall, while modern glass commercial buildings line the left. Orange and white concrete barriers separate the walkway from the street where sparse traffic flows.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk approaching industrial complex entrance

events.description: passing a pedestrian with pink hair who turns around to look back

agents.ego_description: passing pedestrians on the sidewalk including a person with distinctive pink hair who turns to look back

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking past and turning around to look back

entered.detail: orange text painted on the concrete barriers reading NO REGRETS
tall gray concrete wall with graffiti separating the street from the industrial facility

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the camera passes several pedestrians including a notable character with pink hair who turns around. The spherical industrial tanks grow larger in the frame, and graffiti reading NO REGRETS becomes visible on the concrete barriers. The industrial concrete wall of the facility is now prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing near industrial spherical tanks

events.description: turning right and crossing the street toward the industrial tanks
turning left and crossing back to the original sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street to view the spherical industrial tanks up close from the opposite side, then returning to the original sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green vintage-style car driving past on the street

entered.detail: white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and crosses the asphalt street, bringing the spherical industrial tanks into close view. From the opposite sidewalk, the concrete barriers are now on the left, and the industrial wall dominates the right side. A green car drives past as the camera crosses back to the original sidewalk, returning to the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk continuing past commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past additional pedestrians in business attire

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking toward camera while looking at phone

entered.detail: tall cylindrical glass building with green-tinted windows
tall thin skyscraper visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: Back on the original sidewalk, the industrial complex recedes into the distance as the camera continues forward. New architectural elements including a glass tower appear on the right, while the modern commercial building returns to the left foreground. Pedestrians in business attire walk toward the camera as the journey continues down the futuristic city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic city street that shifts from an industrial zone dominated by spherical tanks to a more polished commercial district. It begins on a concrete sidewalk where large industrial spheres loom behind a wall to the right and glass buildings line the left, separated from sparse traffic by orange and white barriers. As the camera moves forward, it passes pedestrians, including a person with pink hair, while graffiti reading NO REGRETS becomes visible on the barriers. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right to cross the asphalt street, bringing the massive industrial tanks into close view and passing a green car before returning to the original walkway. Finally, the industrial complex recedes into the distance as the camera continues forward, revealing a glass tower on the right and pedestrians in business attire walking toward the viewer.
